subject: Fermi GBM trigger 390275038 / 130515072 is not a GRB
body:
P. Jenke (UAH), reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

�The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 390275038 / 130515072 at 01:43:55.53 UT
on 15 May 2013, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is due to an X-class solar flare."
